title: Thaumcraft 6 Aspects for JEI
description: A mod to add browsable aspects for Thaumcraft in JEI
body:
Mod that adds the ability to search what items are linked to what Thaumcraft aspect in the form of a JEI plugin.

Find the crystal or the phial of an aspect in JEI or in an inventory, hover over it, press JEI's lookup keybind (U by default)

**This mod is no longer supported, and will receive no updates or fixes**

*To anyone looking for the source code, this mod was made in a few days with the intent of being deleted soon after. It stuck around, and I don't have the sources anymore. Sorry*
